name: BUNGE LTD.  DL -,01
summary: Bunge Limited is an agribusiness and food company operating in the farm-to-consumer food chain worldwide. The company purchases, stores, transports, processes, and sells agricultural commodities and products, operating through segments like agribusiness, edible oil products, milling products, and sugar and bioenergy. Bunge Limited is headquartered in White Plains, New York.
